name: Portrait Creation Toolkit
description: This guide is a structured reference for creating realistic and controllable AI portraits. It organizes appearance into clearly defined parameters with predefined, AI-friendly values, allowing you to build characters with precision instead of trial and error.
text:
What’s included in the guide:

  • Age— 22 clearly defined age ranges
  • Ethnicity— 21 ethnicity options
  • Face params— 48 facial structure and feature parameters
  • Skin— 37 skin tone values
  • Eyes— 20 eye colors
  • Hair— 48 hair texture, length, and color variations
  • Expression— 42 facial expression options
  • 30 Different prompt examples with reference photos

By combining these parameters, you can quickly generate consistent, believable characters while keeping full control over appearance. The guide helps reduce randomness, avoid distorted or inconsistent faces, and maintain a coherent visual style across multiple images.
